funFacts: Kawaii is the Japanese culture of cuteness, characterized by friendly faces and rounded, clean minimalist lines.
Designed for Medium difficulty, this specific sheet is perfect for practicing smooth gradient shading using fine-tip gel pens.
Coloring this drawing is a fantastic way to learn about natural botany and organic patterns while developing fine motor coordination.
